name: Out-of-Bounds Candy Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1/4 cup of the coconut, the milk, gelatin, and cornstarch in a blender.
Blend until smooth.
2. Pour into a small saucepan and cook over medium heat until slightly thickened.
3. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract.
4. Stir in the remaining coconut.
5. Form into 8 bars and allow to firm and cool completely.
6. Dip in chocolate.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
